description: Completed 20 patrols, no incidents. Bare infrastructure: no rigs, no plugins, no dogs. All 500 patrol steps (25x20) passed clean. No mail received, no extraordinary actions.

description: Completed 1 patrol cycle. Fixed missing issue_prefix on town beads DB (set to hq, filed hq-h8z). Infrastructure is bare: no rigs, no plugins, no dogs. All 25 patrol steps passed clean. Previous session had patrol_count=20, reset to 0 for next deacon.
title: 🤝 HANDOFF: Routine patrol + infra fix

description: The town beads DB at .beads/beads.db had no issue_prefix config set. This caused gt patrol new and bd mol wisp create to fail with 'database not initialized: issue_prefix config is missing'. Fixed by setting issue_prefix=hq. Existing issues had prefix massage- (from original init). The hq prefix is now used for new issues including wisps. Root cause: likely a migration or re-init that didn't carry over the prefix config.
title: Town beads missing issue_prefix caused patrol wisp creation failures

description: Completed 15 patrol cycles, no incidents. Rig idle entire session — no polecats, no mail. Deacon and refinery healthy throughout.
title: 🤝 HANDOFF: Witness cycle
